## Checklist

- [ ] `node --test` passes
- [ ] `npm run scrub` passes (no personal/private data)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] New agent/notifier is idempotent and non-destructive
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
